title: Baidyanath is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Baidyanath is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Baidyanath has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Baidyanath:
Baidyanath is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baidyanath!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
